goal: Reduce unsafe casts in accountant, director, and contractor domain flows using typed DTO adapters and parser guards while keeping provider IO in transport-owned boundaries.

selectedDomainFlows: accountant inbox scope DTO row mapping
director pending proposal scope parser and pending-row fallback reads
contractor works bundle enrichment fallback rows
contractor work PDF source DTO parsing

notSelected.reason: React hook fallback/preload casts remain classified for a later UI/hook-focused director data wave. This wave handled director repository and proposal-scope parsing.
Remaining contractor casts are work-modal or act-builder source reads, separate from selected works bundle and PDF source flows.
Remaining hits are test/mock casts or contract literal coverage, not selected production data flow code.

selectedFindingsBefore.flow: contractor works bundle enrichment fallback reads

changes.change: Replaced accountant inbox object and row parser casts with isRpcRecord-based DTO guards and safer error message extraction.
Exported and hardened the director proposal-scope parser with isRpcRecord guards instead of object-to-record casts.
Replaced director pending fallback PagedDirectorQuery casts with guarded paged query adapters and filtered primary RPC blobs through record guards.
Replaced director listPending fallback PagedQuery cast with createGuardedPagedQuery.
Replaced contractor works enrichment PagedQuery casts and typed-array casts with guarded paged query adapters and row guards.
Extracted a pure contractor PDF source parser and replaced object-to-record casts with isRpcRecord guards.

typedRowMapping: tests/api/domainUnsafeCastBatchB.contract.test.ts parses director pending proposal scope rows
emptyResult: src/screens/contractor/contractor.loadWorksService.test.ts keeps empty RPC result as honest empty state
malformedResult: tests/api/domainUnsafeCastBatchB.contract.test.ts rejects malformed director proposal and contractor PDF payloads
src/screens/contractor/contractor.loadWorksService.test.ts rejects malformed contractor RPC work rows
providerError: src/screens/contractor/contractor.loadWorksService.test.ts surfaces RPC failure without legacy fallback
roleSpecificBehavior: src/screens/contractor/contractor.loadWorksService.test.ts keeps contractor-created_by scope behavior and filters unscoped rows

selectedFilesUnsafePatternsBefore.command: git grep -n -E "as any|unknown as|@ts-ignore|@ts-expect-error" HEAD -- selected files

selectedFilesUnsafePatternsAfter.command: git grep -n -E "as any|unknown as|@ts-ignore|@ts-expect-error" -- selected files

broaderAccountantDirectorContractorScan.command: git grep -n -E "unknown as|as any|@ts-ignore|@ts-expect-error" -- src/screens/accountant src/screens/director src/screens/contractor src/lib/api
remainingCategories: director reports cache/naming and finance runtime env casts
